validationMetric: Generate 5+ qualified leads in 14 days AND get 1 business to agree a per-lead price

killCriteria: <3 leads in 14 days OR no buyer will commit to a per-lead price

first10: Line up ONE buyer business first; then drive niche traffic (local SEO + 1 paid test) to generate leads
